name: pathsim_chem
description: PathSim-Chem: Chemical Engineering Blocks for PathSim

name: ResidenceTime
description: Chemical process block with residence time model.

name: Process
description: Simplified version of the `ResidenceTime` model block

name: Splitter
description: Splitter block that splits the input signal into multiple

name: Bubbler4
description: Tritium bubbling system with sequential vial collection stages.

description: Define event action function and return a `ScheduleList` event

name: _create_reset_events
description: Create reset events for all vials based on the replacement times.

name: GLC
description: Counter-current bubble column gas-liquid contactor (GLC) for tritium extraction.

name: _physics
description: Physical properties and dimensionless groups for the input `u`.

name: _ode
description: Malara right-hand side, with dimensionless groups derived from `u`.

name: _bc
description: Malara boundary conditions, with groups derived from `u`.

name: update
description: Solve the BVP and expose the dimensional results at the output ports.

name: results
description: Post-process the current BVP solution into dimensional results.

description: Ionisation chamber for tritium detection.

name: pathsim_chem.tritium.glc
description: Bubble column gas-liquid contactor model solver.

name: GLC
description: Counter-current bubble column gas-liquid contactor (GLC) for tritium extraction.

name: _physics
description: Physical properties and dimensionless groups for the input `u`.

name: _ode
description: Malara right-hand side, with dimensionless groups derived from `u`.

name: _bc
description: Malara boundary conditions, with groups derived from `u`.

name: update
description: Solve the BVP and expose the dimensional results at the output ports.

name: results
description: Post-process the current BVP solution into dimensional results.

name: _calculate_properties
description: Calculate temperature-dependent and geometry-dependent physical properties.

name: _calculate_dimensionless_groups
description: Calculate the dimensionless groups for the ODE system.

name: _ode_system
description: First-order ODE system (4 equations) of the dimensionless GLC model.

name: _boundary_conditions
description: Boundary-condition residuals at xi=0 (Sa) and xi=1 (Sb).

name: _process_results
description: Process the BVP solution to produce dimensional results.

name: IonisationChamber
description: Ionisation chamber for tritium detection.

name: ResidenceTime
description: Chemical process block with residence time model.

name: Process
description: Simplified version of the `ResidenceTime` model block

name: Splitter
description: Splitter block that splits the input signal into multiple

name: TCAP1D
description: This block models the Thermal Cycle Absorption Process (TCAP) in 1d.

name: Activity Coefficients
description: Simulating how NRTL activity coefficients for the ethanol-water system evolve with temperature using PathSim blocks and connections.

name: Continuous Stirred-Tank Reactor
description: Simulating the startup transient of an exothermic first-order reaction in a cooled CSTR, showing the dynamic interaction between concentration decay and temperature rise.

name: Counter-Current Heat Exchanger
description: Simulating the startup transient of a counter-current shell-and-tube heat exchanger, showing how temperature profiles develop along the exchanger length.

name: Cubic Equations of State
description: Simulating the compressibility factor of methane across a pressure sweep using the Peng-Robinson and Soave-Redlich-Kwong equations of state wired into a PathSim simulation.

name: Flash Drum and Distillation Column
description: Simulating two fundamental separation processes: an isothermal binary flash drum and a multi-tray distillation column built from individual DistillationTray blocks wired in series.

name: Vapor Pressure Curves
description: Comparing vapor pressure correlations for water by sweeping temperature through Antoine, Kirchhoff, and Wagner blocks wired into a PathSim simulation.

name: Multi-Component Flash Separation (BTX)
description: Simulating an isothermal flash drum for a ternary benzene–toluene–p-xylene (BTX) mixture.

name: Process Flowsheet: Mixer → Heater → CSTR
description: A simple process combining multiple unit operations into a flowsheet:

name: Reactor Point Kinetics
description: Simulating the transient neutron population in a nuclear reactor using the point kinetics equations (PKE) with six delayed neutron precursor groups.

name: Valve Flow Characteristics
description: Exploring the flow behaviour of the Valve block under varying pressure drop conditions.
